text: The Memphis Grizzlies waived Lester Hudson .

The Cleveland Cavaliers traded LeBron James to the Miami Heat for a 2011 2nd round draft pick ( Milan Mačvan was later selected), a 2012 2nd round draft pick ( Jae Crowder was later selected), a 2013 1st round draft pick ( Nemanja Nedović was later selected) and a 2016 1st round draft pick ( Timothé Luwawu-Cabarrot was later selected). Cleveland also received a trade exception from Miami. Cleveland had the option to swap 1st round draft picks with Miami in 2012 but did not do so.

The Miami Heat traded a 2011 1st round draft pick ( Norris Cole was later selected) and a 2011 1st round draft pick ( Jonas Valančiūnas was later selected) to the Toronto Raptors for Chris Bosh . Toronto also received a trade exception from Miami. This was the same 1st round draft pick that Toronto had previously traded to Miami on February 13, 2009.

The San Antonio Spurs recalled Danny Green from the Austin Toros of the G-League.
The Toronto Raptors recalled Solomon Alabi from the Erie BayHawks of the G-League.
The Philadelphia 76ers recalled Craig Brackins from the Springfield Armor of the G-League.
The San Antonio Spurs recalled Da'Sean Butler from the Austin Toros of the G-League.
The Philadelphia 76ers signed Antonio Daniels to a 10-day contract.
The Los Angeles Lakers recalled Derrick Caracter from the Bakersfield Jam of the G-League.
The Washington Wizards signed Larry Owens as a free agent.
The Washington Wizards waived Cartier Martin .
The Los Angeles Lakers assigned Derrick Caracter to the Bakersfield Jam of the G-League.
The Oklahoma City Thunder signed Robert Vaden as a free agent.
The Oklahoma City Thunder assigned Robert Vaden to the Tulsa 66ers of the G-League.
The Houston Rockets assigned Marcus Cousin to the Rio Grande Valley Vipers of the G-League.
The Houston Rockets signed Marcus Cousin as a free agent.
The Houston Rockets waived DeMarre Carroll .
The Houston Rockets recalled Hasheem Thabeet from the Rio Grande Valley Vipers of the G-League.
The Los Angeles Clippers recalled Willie Warren from the Bakersfield Jam of the G-League.
The Portland Trail Blazers signed Earl Barron to a contract for the rest of the season.
The Los Angeles Lakers signed Trey Johnson as a free agent.
The Houston Rockets signed Marqus Blakely as a free agent.
The Oklahoma City Thunder recalled Cole Aldrich from the Tulsa 66ers of the G-League.
The Los Angeles Lakers recalled Derrick Caracter from the Bakersfield Jam of the G-League.
The Oklahoma City Thunder recalled Robert Vaden from the Tulsa 66ers of the G-League.
The Houston Rockets recalled Marcus Cousin from the Rio Grande Valley Vipers of the G-League.
The Houston Rockets hired Kevin McHale as Head Coach.
The Golden State Warriors hired Mark Jackson as Head Coach.
The Sacramento Kings waived Jermaine Taylor .
The Toronto Raptors hired Dwane Casey as Head Coach.
The Indiana Pacers traded Dāvis Bertāns , Kawhi Leonard and Erazem Lorbek to the San Antonio Spurs for George Hill .
The Boston Celtics traded MarShon Brooks to the New Jersey Nets for JaJuan Johnson and a 2014 2nd round draft pick ( Russ Smith was later selected).

In a 3-team trade, the Charlotte Bobcats traded Tobias Harris , Stephen Jackson and Shaun Livingston to the Milwaukee Bucks ; the Milwaukee Bucks traded Corey Maggette to the Charlotte Bobcats ; the Milwaukee Bucks traded Jimmer Fredette and John Salmons to the Sacramento Kings ; the Sacramento Kings traded Bismack Biyombo to the Charlotte Bobcats ; and the Sacramento Kings traded Beno Udrih to the Milwaukee Bucks .

The Houston Rockets traded Brad Miller , Nikola Mirotić , Chandler Parsons and a 2013 1st round draft pick ( Andre Roberson was later selected) to the Minnesota Timberwolves for Jonny Flynn , Donatas Motiejūnas and a 2012 2nd round draft pick ( Will Barton was later selected).

In a 3-team trade, the Dallas Mavericks traded Jordan Hamilton and Tanguy Ngombo to the Portland Trail Blazers ; the Denver Nuggets traded Raymond Felton to the Portland Trail Blazers ; the Portland Trail Blazers traded Rudy Fernández and Petteri Koponen to the Dallas Mavericks ; and the Portland Trail Blazers traded Jordan Hamilton , Andre Miller and a 2014 2nd round draft pick ( Devyn Marble was later selected) to the Denver Nuggets .
The New Orleans Hornets traded Josh Harrellson to the New York Knicks for cash.
The Cleveland Cavaliers traded Justin Harper to the Orlando Magic for a 2013 2nd round draft pick ( Allen Crabbe was later selected) and a 2014 2nd round draft pick ( Joe Harris was later selected).
The Charlotte Bobcats traded Jeremy Tyler to the Golden State Warriors for cash.
The Chicago Bulls traded Norris Cole , Malcolm Lee and cash to the Minnesota Timberwolves for Nikola Mirotić .
The Miami Heat traded Bojan Bogdanović to the Minnesota Timberwolves for Norris Cole .
The Denver Nuggets traded a 2013 2nd round draft pick ( Alex Oriakhi was later selected) to the Los Angeles Lakers for Chukwudiebere Maduabum .
The Minnesota Timberwolves traded Bojan Bogdanović to the New Jersey Nets for cash and a 2013 2nd round draft pick ( Lorenzo Brown was later selected).
The Houston Rockets traded cash to the Minnesota Timberwolves for Chandler Parsons .
The Minnesota Timberwolves traded a 2015 2nd round draft pick ( Richaun Holmes was later selected) to the Portland Trail Blazers for Tanguy Ngombo .
The Cleveland Cavaliers traded J.J. Hickson to the Sacramento Kings for Omri Casspi and a 2017 2nd round draft pick ( Jordan Bell was later selected).

The Golden State Warriors waived Jeff Adrien .
